parameters: From today, he'll be a new resident of this village.
I look forward to working with you all...
\N<Mayor>Oh? Do you two already know each other?
The more familiar faces, the better!
Kaede seemed to be feeling unwell since this morning.
\N<Mayor>Since you'll be living in this village,
we expect you to take initiative in helping out.
\N<Kazumi>We could use some help at the beach, right?
Then, Shimoyama, please take care of the beach.
but due to papers, you can't move in until tomorrow.
I intended to invite them to stay with us tonight!
\N<Mayor>Oh, I see! You're a lifesaver. Thanks.
From today, you're a resident of this village!
\N<Mayor>Well, it's late already. Let's end it here.
You can stay over at our place tonight, okay. ♪
But, I have something to discuss with Naoto...
There isn't some deep reason or anything...
What you did to me and Kaede...!
and had sex with Kaede, that's all, right?
\N<Shimoyama>Oh, and I even fucked her ass... ♪

I don't intend to go after her...

there's nothing you can do, right?

I still can't forget her... I fell really hard for her.

you have the same last name.
I'm sure you're happy to have a relative
Then Aya, if it's okay with you.

I'll introduce them to you next time.
\N<Aya>Really, it's been a while, Naoto. ♡ Kaede. ♡

The bliss when his dick enters you...

Even though I knew it was wrong.

It's because I wanted to meet you, Naoto. ♡
\N<Aya>Anyway... Kaede, you want it too, right?

\N<Aya>Actually, I wasn't lying when I said I came to
Also, Kaede, you shouldn't hold back, okay? ♡

\N<Shimoyama>But once she got a taste of my pleasure,
she indulged in it, raw sex, creampie...
Well, it's not something to decide right now, right?

let's go back to the house we were given. ♡
\N<Naoto>Anyway... let's just... go home for today...
